briefdescription.para: Integration tests for ImitatePass and RealPass backends.

detaileddescription.para: These tests spin up a real GPG homedir, generate a temporary key, and drive the password-store operations end-to-end without mocking gpg.

Prerequisites (all available on standard CI):
gpg (GnuPG 2.x)
pass (optional – RealPass tests are skipped when absent)
pass otp extension (optional – OTP tests skipped when absent)

memberdef.argsstring: (const QString &gnupgHome, const QStringList &args, const QString &input=QString(), QString *out=nullptr, QString *err=nullptr)
memberdef.name: runGpg
